settings.placeholder_content:
We want you to love what you ordered. If you are not completely satisfied, we accept returns within 30 days of delivery for a full refund or exchange.

Items must be unworn, unwashed, and returned in their original packaging with all tags attached. Sale items and final sale pieces are not eligible for return.

To start a return or exchange, email us at hello@sovana.com with your order number and reason. We will send you a prepaid return label within 1–2 business days.

Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days of receiving your return and will be issued to your original payment method.
